subcodes.first_line: In this day, every soul that hath turned toward the Supreme Horizon beholdeth the Sun of Truth rising therefrom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الیوم هر نفسی بافق اعلی توجه نمود و آفتاب حقیقت را که از او مشرق است ملاحظه
subcodes.subjects: @suffering; rejection of Christ, @knowledge; recognition of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
